shell.profileErrorBody: The connection to the server failed or timed out. Check your internet connection, then try again.
shell.profileNotFoundBody: Your account is authenticated ({{email}}) but no profile is associated with it. Sign in again or contact the staff.
shell.profileIncompleteBody: Your account ({{email}}) is authenticated, but its setup is incomplete (missing role or club link). Contact the staff to finalise your access.
shell.readOnlyBanner: Read-only mode — coach. Full club view, no editing.
shell.playerNotLinked: Your player profile isn't linked to the squad yet. Contact the staff.

joueur.title: Welcome 👋
joueur.text: This is your player space. A few screens to show you the essentials. You can skip this tour at any time.

joueur.title: Your daily check-in
joueur.text: Every day, fill in your morning check-in (well-being, sleep, weight) and your evening one. It's the basis of your monitoring and readiness.

joueur.title: Your sessions
joueur.text: Find your scheduled sessions, complete them and log how you felt (RPE, loads). Staff sees your progress live.

joueur.title: Challenges
joueur.text: Take on challenges set by the staff to earn bonus points. You can also decline a challenge that doesn't suit you.

joueur.title: The leaderboard
joueur.text: Check-ins, sessions, activities and challenges earn you points. Climb the divisions and compare yourself to your team.

joueur.title: Where I stand
joueur.text: Compare your physical tests to your team and line averages, with the Top 14 marker. It's up to you to aim higher!

staff.title: Welcome 👋
staff.text: This is your staff space. A quick tour of the main sections — skippable at any time.

staff.title: Your players
staff.text: The squad, detailed profiles (physical tests, weight, ×BW) and adding players are all managed from the Players screen.

staff.title: Monitoring
staff.text: Readiness, load, ACWR and alerts flag who to watch. Handle alerts or forward them to the physio.

staff.title: Programs & camps
staff.text: Create programs, schedule camps and test campaigns, and assign it all to your players.

staff.title: Challenges
staff.text: Launch configurable challenges (points, two-step validation) to motivate and energise the group.

staff.title: Comparison
staff.text: Compare two players, or a player to the team / line average, across the 9 tests (table, bars, radar, Top 14 marker).

player.title: Where do I stand?
player.intro: Your values per test compared to your team or line average, with the Top 14 marker. Only averages are shown — never a teammate's values.
player.noTestBody: Your results will appear here after your next physical assessment.

meditation.title: Meditation & Relaxation
meditation.subtitle: Take a moment for yourself: breathing, deep relaxation and short sessions to unwind and recover better.

reward.points: +10 pts for a session done today

meditation.footer: Find a quiet place, get comfortable, and let yourself be guided. One session a day is enough to feel the benefits.

jacobson.releaseHint: Release completely. Feel the relaxation spread through the area.

hands.label: Hands & forearms
hands.hint: Clench your fists, tense your forearms.

shoulders.label: Shoulders & neck
shoulders.hint: Raise your shoulders towards your ears.

face.label: Face
face.hint: Close your eyes, scrunch your forehead and jaw.

back.label: Back
back.hint: Draw your shoulder blades together, arch slightly.

player.doneSub: Take a moment before getting back to your activity.

jacobson.title: Muscle relaxation (Jacobson)
jacobson.subtitle: Tense then release each muscle group

schultz.label: Settle in
schultz.text: Get comfortable, close your eyes. Let your body become heavy and still.

schultz.label: Heaviness
schultz.text: My right arm is heavy… my whole body becomes heavy, relaxed, let go.

schultz.label: Warmth
schultz.text: A gentle warmth spreads through my arms and legs. My limbs are warm and heavy.

schultz.label: Calm heart
schultz.text: My heart beats calmly and steadily. Peaceful, quiet.

schultz.label: Breathing
schultz.text: My breathing is calm and free. It breathes within me, effortlessly.

schultz.label: Solar plexus
schultz.text: My solar plexus is warm, my belly is relaxed and soft.

schultz.label: Cool forehead
schultz.text: My forehead is cool and clear. My mind is calm and rested.

schultz.label: Return
schultz.text: Become aware of your body again. Gently move your fingers, stretch, open your eyes.

prematch.label: Grounding
prematch.text: Breathe deeply. Feel your footing on the ground, solid and stable.

prematch.label: Activation
prematch.text: Breathe in energy, feel your body wake up, ready for the effort.

prematch.label: Focus
prematch.text: Picture your first successful move. You are focused, present, confident.

prematch.label: Ready
prematch.text: Three powerful breaths. You are ready. Let's go.

postmatch.label: Let go
postmatch.text: The effort is over. Release your shoulders, jaw, hands.

postmatch.label: Breath
postmatch.text: Breathe slowly, let your heart rate come down.

postmatch.label: Recovery
postmatch.text: Feel the relaxation reach your legs, your arms. Your body recovers.

postmatch.label: Gentle review
postmatch.text: Note one positive thing about your performance. Then let go.

sleep.label: Slow down
sleep.text: Close your eyes. Let the day drift away, without holding on.

sleep.label: Weight
sleep.text: Your body sinks into the mattress, heavier and heavier.

sleep.label: Long breath
sleep.text: Lengthen each exhale. Sleep comes on its own.

sleep.label: Drift
sleep.text: Nothing to do, nothing to think. Let yourself drift away.

stress.label: Acknowledge
stress.text: Name what you feel, without judging it. It's just tension.

stress.label: Breath
stress.text: Breathe out slowly, twice as long as the inhale.

stress.label: Release
stress.text: With each exhale, release a tense area: shoulders, belly, forehead.

stress.label: Refocus
stress.text: Come back to the present moment. One thing you see, one you hear.

taches.title: My tasks
taches.emptyHint: Your staff will assign some here (each validated task = +2 points).

defis.title: Challenges
defis.emptyHint: Your staff will post some here — take them on to earn points and badges.
defis.declineConfirm:
Don't take part in the challenge “{{title}}”?
It will leave your active challenges (no points lost).
defis.refused: 🚫 You're not taking part in this challenge.

quest.title: Questionnaires
quest.emptyHint: Your staff will send some here (health, profile…).

seances.emptyHint: Your S&C coach will send your program here.

crew.allInvited: All your teammates are already in the team or invited.
crew.createHint: Form a team with your club friends. A banner is drawn at random, and your points add up on the team leaderboard.
crew.errAlreadyTeam: This player is already in a team.

bilan.secEveningMarkers: HOW THE DAY / MATCH FELT — 6 MARKERS
bilan.activityHint: Declare what you did today — each activity declared earns you 10 points on the leaderboard.
bilan.matchPlaceholder: How did your match / session go?
bilan.remarksPlaceholder: Pain, points of attention, note for the staff…

session.testHint: Physical tests — the staff enters your results (profile + Top 14 comparison).
session.notEnoughHistory: Not enough history yet to plot a progression. Validate at least two sessions with this exercise.

messages.title: Messages
messages.emptyRoster: No players in the squad. Add players to message them.

subs.title: Notification subscriptions
subs.noDevice: No device — will not receive push notifications

programFiles.title: Files · {{title}}
programFiles.bucketNote: Private bucket · access via signed link (1 h)
programFiles.add: Add a PDF or a video
programFiles.empty: No files. Add the program PDF or an analysis video.

library.empty: No exercise. Change your search or create a custom exercise.

video.intro1: Match/training videos stored in the team's
video.intro2: . Playback via a temporary signed link — never a public URL (minors' data, GDPR).
video.empty: No video. Upload a match or a sequence to analyse.

import.noColumn: No column recognised. Use the template.
import.title: Import players (Excel / CSV)
import.step1Hint: 1 row = 1 player. Totem (or number) = key. Test columns optional. Decimals with comma or dot. MAS in m/s.

tasks.title: Tasks · {{count}}
tasks.empty: No task. Create one (e.g. “Bring your boots”, “Physio appointment”) — the player marks it done, you confirm, +2 points.

testsBatch.title: Bulk test entry
testsBatch.createFirst: Create a campaign to start entering data.

alerts.empty: No alert. All indicators are green. ✅

hist.title: Check-in history
hist.trendsLegend: ☀️ Morning — Readiness /100 · Wellness /50 · Sleep (h)  ·  🌙 Evening — Feeling /10

questionnaires.remindConfirm_one:
Remind the {{count}} missing player for “{{name}}”?
They will receive a notification (badge + push).
questionnaires.remindConfirm_other:
Remind the {{count}} missing players for “{{name}}”?
They will receive a notification (badge + push).
questionnaires.title: Questionnaires · {{count}}
questionnaires.empty: No questionnaire. Compose a template (health, profile…) from the question bank, then send it to players.
questionnaires.remindBtn_one: Send a reminder · remind the {{count}} missing
questionnaires.remindBtn_other: Send a reminder · remind the {{count}} missing
questionnaires.chosenEmpty: None. Pick some from the bank below.

camps.title: Camps · {{count}}
camps.empty: No camp. Create a named period (e.g. “Summer camp – 21-28 Jul”) to group sessions, tests and enrolments.
camps.errDate: The end date must follow the start date.
camps.noCampaign: No campaign attached. “Enter” creates a campaign (e.g. “Start” then “End”) dated to the camp — values carry over to the player card + Top 14 comparison + points.
camps.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Enrolments are deleted; test campaigns are kept (detached).
camps.errDateRange: The date must be within the camp period.
camps.hintTest: Test session assigned to camp players — you'll enter their values on the day.
camps.hintNormal: Blank session — add the exercises later in Programs.

challenges.openNobody: Nobody has claimed this open challenge yet.
challenges.title: Challenges · {{count}}
challenges.empty: No challenge. Create one (custom points, banner, gear…) individually or in a grid, then publish.
challenges.errNoTitle: Fill in at least one title.

programs.videoInvalid: Link not recognised — paste a YouTube URL or an http(s) link.
programs.routineLoaded: Template “{{name}}” loaded — adjust dates and recipients then send.
programs.routineErrName: Give the template a name (Title field).
programs.routineErrExo: Add at least one exercise (with a name) before saving the template.
programs.pdfImported: PDF imported — check and adjust the exercises before sending.
programs.pdfNoLib: PDF reading unavailable — enter the session manually.
programs.pdfUnrecognized: PDF not recognised automatically — complete the exercises below.
programs.errDates: Check the dates: the end must be after the start.
programs.errPlayers: Select at least one recipient player.
programs.errExo: Add at least one exercise (with a name) to a session before sending.
programs.errNoSessions: No session generated: the dates cover none of the days chosen for the sessions. Widen the period or change a session's day.
programs.emptyList: No program. Create one or import a PDF — the sessions are materialised and appear for the players.

app.title: Squad · {{count}}
app.empty: No player. Add the first member — they'll appear live on all staff devices.
app.errTotem: Choose a totem for the player.
app.errTaken: This totem is already taken in the squad. Choose another (🎲 button).
app.errTakenShort: This totem is already taken in the squad. Choose another.
app.totemHint1: The player is identified by a
app.noData: No data. Add players and wait for the first check-ins.

top14.title: TOP 14 COMPARISON
top14.posUnknown: Position not recognised for the Top 14 comparison.
top14.footer: Senior Top 14 norms (lower bound), by position. Strength in ×BW (bodyweight required). +30 pts per test reached.

conversation.emptyStaff: No message. Write the first message to this player.
conversation.emptyPlayer: No message. Write to the staff — they'll reply here.

notif.pushUnavailable: 🔔 Push notifications unavailable on this browser. On iPhone, add the app to the home screen first.
notif.pushDenied: Blocked — allow them in the browser settings.
notif.pushOff: Get challenges, tasks and messages even when the app is closed.
notif.title: Notifications

privacy.subtitle: Access, export and erasure — in accordance with GDPR.
privacy.noConsent: No consent recorded for this player.
privacy.portabilityDesc: Download {{poss}} data (check-ins, sessions, messages, consent) in JSON format.
privacy.eraseDescSelf: Permanently delete your account and all your data (check-ins, sessions, messages, consent).
privacy.eraseDescOther: Permanently delete this player and all their data (check-ins, sessions, messages, consent), as well as their account if they have one.
privacy.eraseBtnSelf: Delete my account and my data
privacy.eraseBtnOther: Delete this player and their data

media.title: Media library · {{count}}
media.emptyHint: Add a YouTube / Instagram link by theme.
media.noEmbed: Embedded playback unavailable for this link.
media.thumbGenericAdd: — generic thumbnail (add an image below if you want)

leaderboard.title: LEADERBOARD
leaderboard.subtitle: Internal season · {{count}} players
leaderboard.top14Title: {{count}} test(s) at Top 14 level — click for details
leaderboard.teamFooterCrews: Team score = sum of members' points.
leaderboard.teamFooterLines: Grouped by line — create your teams (crews) in the “My team” tab.

fiche.pwErrWeak: Password too weak (10+, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special).
fiche.pwDone: Password reset ✓ — share it with the player.
fiche.pwIntro: Set a new password for this player, then share it with them. No email is sent.
fiche.selfDescBefore: They appear everywhere in the app as
fiche.selfDescAfter: . Your full name is never shown.

tests.title: TEST EVOLUTION
tests.emptyEdit: No test campaign. Click “Enter” to create one and record the values.

reset.errWeak: Password too weak (10+, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special).
reset.doneDesc: You can now access your space with your new password.
reset.title: New password

login.signupInfo: Account created. Check your inbox to confirm, then sign in.
login.forgotInfo: Reset email sent (if the account exists).
login.staffRequestInfo: Request sent to the staff. They will give you a new password.
login.consentText: As the legal guardian, I consent to the processing of this minor player's data (including health data) for performance monitoring.

link.expired: The reset link has expired. Request a new email below.
link.invalid: Invalid or already-used link. Request a new email below.

owner.impersonateBanner: 👁 Owner view — you are viewing as {{name}} · {{role}}{{team}} · read-only

msg.emptyRow: No totem or number — row ignored
msg.noTotem: Cannot create without a totem (number alone not found)
msg.noPos: Cannot create without a valid position
